comment: CSS Governance Allowlist - Temporary Exceptions for Phase 3

styles/sheets/v2-npc-specific.css.reason: NPC sheet variant - defines alternative layout for non-player characters
styles/sheets/v2-npc-specific.css.planned_removal: Phase 4 - migrate to shared layout system

styles/sheets/v2-droid-specific.css.reason: Droid sheet variant - defines alternative layout for droid characters
styles/sheets/v2-droid-specific.css.planned_removal: Phase 4 - migrate to shared layout system

styles/sheets/vehicle-sheet.css.reason: Vehicle sheet - defines alternative layout for vehicle actor type
styles/sheets/vehicle-sheet.css.planned_removal: Phase 4 - migrate to shared layout system

styles/sheets/unified-sheets.css.reason: Unified sheet system - legacy consolidation, planned for replacement

styles/sheets/item-sheet.css.reason: Item sheet (different document type) - not part of character sheet contract
styles/sheets/item-sheet.css.comment: Item sheets use different governance rules

styles/sheets/droid-sheet.css.reason: Droid sheet variant (older) - parallel to v2-droid-specific.css

styles/archive/sheets-v3/v3/core/layout..reason: Archived V3 experimental sheet system - not in active use
styles/archive/sheets-v3/v3/core/layout..comment: Archive code is intentionally preserved; violations are not blocking

styles/apps/swse-templates-consolidated..reason: Application UI templates - different governance domain from character sheet
styles/apps/swse-templates-consolidated..comment: App sheets use separate contract rules

styles/apps/upgrade-app.css.reason: Character upgrade/creation application - separate app from character sheet

styles/progression-framework/progression.reason: Progression framework shell - separate application framework
styles/progression-framework/progression.comment: Not part of character sheet governance

styles/layout/sheet-layout.css.reason: Generic Foundry V13 baseline - v2-sheet.css is authoritative override
styles/layout/sheet-layout.css.comment: Generic baseline rules are safe; character-sheet-specific rules override

normative_authority: The audit is authoritative for the normal SWSE character sheet only
note: Allowlist entries with status=temporary should be reviewed in Phase 4 for consolidation
